/usr/lib/ccache/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libastroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libastroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state__description.c.o CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state_list__description.c.o CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state_list__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/astroviz_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/astroviz_interfaces/msg/detail/motor_state_list__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
